/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/ArbolB_Grafico.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/ArbolB_Grafico.dir/ArbolB_Grafico_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ArbolB_Grafico.dir/main_gui.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ArbolB_Grafico.dir/MainWindow.cpp.o -o ArbolB_Grafico  /usr/lib/libQt6Widgets.so.6.11.1 /usr/lib/libQt6Gui.so.6.11.1 /usr/lib/libGLX.so /usr/lib/libOpenGL.so /usr/lib/libQt6Core.so.6.11.1
